zara.position: center-left foreground, rising off the couch toward camera
zara.pose: double-biceps flex mid-rise, weight on the forward foot
zara.expression: ecstatic strain - eyes squeezed shut, grin breaking through gritted teeth

mia.position: right midground, pressed back into the couch
mia.pose: recoiling, one cushion clutched to her chest

spatial_rules: Zara fills the left two-thirds of frame in the foreground; Mia is visibly smaller on the couch in the right midground
four hands total in frame: Zara's two fists raised in the flex, Mia's two hands clutching the cushion
the glowing book lies on the rug at lower frame between them
lighting: warm floor-lamp key from the right, teal underglow from the book below
